paper_focus.title: Factors influencing austenite stability during Inter-critical annealing and effect on mechanical properties of low-density medium Mn steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the influence of Al and Si additions on austenite stability during intercritical annealing of a medium-Mn low-density steel and its correlation with the strength–ductility combination.
material_systems: phases: α-ferrite, δ-ferrite, retained austenite, martensite
main_process_variables: Intercritical annealing temperature (600–688 °C, broadened by Al/Si)

visual_evidence.description: This figure presents the tensile engineering stress-strain curves and corresponding strain hardening rate behavior of low-density medium Mn steels, comparing alloy M1 (Fe–8Mn–3Al-0.2C, Si-free) and M2...
